sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Roundhill ARM WeeklyPay ETF announces weekly distribution of $0.5864
feed.summary: The Roundhill ARM WeeklyPay ETF (NYSE Arca: WPAY) has declared a weekly distribution of $0.5864 per share. This distribution will be payable on May 3, 2024, to shareholders of record as of May 1, 2024, with the ex-dividend date being April 30, 2024. WPAY aims to provide investors with a high level of current income through weekly dividend payments.

feed.title: Constellation Energy declares $0.4265 quarterly dividend By Investing.com
feed.summary: Constellation Energy Corporation (NASDAQ:CEG) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.4265 per share, representing a 0.54% yield and a 21% dividend growth over the last year. The dividend will be paid on June 5, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 15, 2026. The company is considered overvalued by InvestingPro analysis and has recently undergone a major acquisition of Calpine for $26.6 billion, leading to varied analyst price target adjustments.

feed.title: Pentair plc 2026 Q1 - Results - Earnings Call Presentation (NYSE:PNR) 2026-04-28
feed.summary: Pentair plc released its Q1 2026 earnings call presentation. The slide deck provides detailed results for the quarter. This article was published by SA Transcripts, who manage the development of Seeking Alpha's transcript-related projects.

feed.title: ACHC Maintained by TD Cowen -- Price Target Raised to $30.00
feed.summary: TD Cowen analyst Ryan Langston has maintained a "Buy" rating on Acadia Healthcare Co (ACHC) and increased its price target from $24.00 to $30.00, reflecting confidence in the company's performance. GuruFocus indicates ACHC is significantly undervalued with a GF Value™ of $75.16 against a current price of $27.64, alongside a solid GF Score™ of 73/100. Despite a low valuation rank, the company shows strengths in profitability and momentum in the growing behavioral healthcare sector.

feed.title: Live Nation Entertainment (LYV) Expected to Announce Earnings on Tuesday
feed.summary: Live Nation Entertainment (LYV) is expected to announce its Q1 2026 earnings on Tuesday, May 5th, with analysts forecasting an EPS of ($0.31) and $3.5862 billion in revenue. The company previously missed EPS estimates in its last report but beat revenue expectations. Live Nation currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with an average price target of $186.29.

feed.title: Constellation Energy Keeps Quarterly Dividend at $0.4265 a Share, Payable June 5 to Holders of Record May 15
feed.summary: Constellation Energy announced it will maintain its quarterly dividend at $0.4265 per share. The dividend is payable on June 5 to shareholders of record as of May 15. This decision reflects the company's commitment to returning value to its investors.

feed.title: KKR & Co. Inc. (KKR) to Release Quarterly Earnings on Tuesday
feed.summary: KKR & Co. Inc. (NYSE:KKR) is scheduled to release its Q1 2026 earnings before the market open on Tuesday, May 5th, with analysts anticipating earnings per share of $1.44 and revenue of $2.399 billion. The article highlights recent insider purchases of KKR stock, a current consensus rating of "Moderate Buy" with a $137.20 target price, and the company's latest dividend declaration. KKR's shares closed up 0.2% at $100.94 on Tuesday.

feed.title: Sustained Data Center Demand for Mass-Capacity Storage Drives BofA’s Bullishness Toward Seagate Technology (STX)
feed.summary: Bank of America has raised its price target for Seagate Technology (STX) to $605 from $450, maintaining a "Buy" rating, driven by sustained demand for mass-capacity storage in data centers. Analysts believe strong data center revenues will offset seasonality in edge IoT markets, and Seagate is expected to report fiscal Q3 revenue and EPS above Street expectations. This bullish outlook is further supported by Seagate's successful qualification and production of its HAMR-based Mozaic 4+ platform with leading hyperscale cloud providers.

feed.title: Pfizer Stock Is Declining Today: What's Happening?
feed.summary: Pfizer (NYSE: PFE) stock is declining today despite reaching patent settlement agreements that extend the U.S. patent expiry for its key drug Vyndamax to June 1, 2031. The pullback appears to be a market rotation away from growth stocks rather than a reaction to the Vyndamax news itself, with technical indicators suggesting short-term pressure but a constructive longer-term trend. The stock is currently consolidating within its 52-week range, with key support at $26.50.

feed.title: Constellation shareholders to get $0.4265 a share on June 5
feed.summary: Constellation Energy Corporation (Nasdaq: CEG) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.4265 per share on its common stock. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on June 5, 2026, to shareholders who are on record as of May 15, 2026. Constellation, a Fortune 200 company, is recognized as the world's largest private-sector power producer and the largest U.S. nuclear energy company.

feed.title: Jim Cramer Calls EQT His “Favorite Oil and Gas Company”
feed.summary: Jim Cramer has endorsed EQT Corporation (NYSE: EQT) as his "favorite oil and gas company," citing its outstanding results driven by the demand for electricity from data centers. Despite Cramer's enthusiasm, ClearBridge Investments recently exited its position in EQT, viewing it as a tactical rather than long-term investment, and suggesting other AI stocks promising higher returns. EQT produces and transports natural gas, managing pipeline capacity and marketing operations.

feed.title: Jim Cramer on Costco: “Never Ever Cheap, and It Is Always Terrific”
feed.summary: Jim Cramer reiterated his positive stance on Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ: COST), despite its high valuation, calling it "terrific" and one of the longest-owned stocks in his Charitable Trust. He highlighted two main catalysts for Costco's continued success: its competitive gasoline prices which draw in new members, and its role as an "inflation fighter," appealing to consumers worried about rising costs. Cramer endorsed buying the stock, even after its recent dips.

feed.title: Seagate Technology Holdings PLC Stock (STX) Moved Down by 3.56% on Apr 28: What Investors Need To Know
feed.summary: Seagate Technology Holdings PLC (STX) stock declined by 3.56% on April 28, likely due to market reactions ahead of its Q3 2026 earnings report scheduled for later that day. Despite recent analyst upgrades and positive sentiment driven by AI demand and storage market strength, increased volatility is common before major financial announcements. Concerns about meeting elevated expectations or broader market uncertainties could have contributed to the intraday shift, alongside technical indicators showing buy signals but also an oversold condition.

feed.title: Western Digital Corp Stock (WDC) Moved Down by 3.22% on Apr 28: Key Drivers Unveiled
feed.summary: Western Digital Corp (WDC) stock declined by 3.22% on April 28, primarily due to investor positioning ahead of its fiscal Q3 2026 earnings report scheduled for April 30. Despite positive analyst ratings and strong demand in the AI data center market, some investors are taking profits, and valuation concerns persist after a significant rally. Technical indicators suggest a buy signal, but the company faces risks including customer concentration, potential overvaluation, intense competition, and substantial long-term debt.

feed.title: Unitedhealth Group Inc Stock (UNH) Moved Up by 3.44% on Apr 28: Facts Behind the Movement
feed.summary: UnitedHealth Group Inc (UNH) saw its stock rise by 3.44% on April 28, driven by strong Q1 2026 earnings that surpassed expectations and a raised full-year outlook. The company's announcement of a $2 billion share repurchase program and a significant investment in AI initiatives further boosted investor confidence, alongside favorable regulatory developments for Medicare Advantage plans. Despite positive technical indicators and analyst upgrades, the article also notes potential risks from medical cost pressures, ongoing DOJ investigations, and lingering effects of the Change Healthcare cyberattack.

feed.title: Red-State AGs Call Out Credit-Rating Companies Over ESG Policy
feed.summary: A coalition of 23 Republican-led state attorneys general has formally expressed concerns to the SEC and major credit-rating firms regarding the incorporation of environmental, social, and governance (ESG) factors in credit downgrade decisions. They allege that Fitch Ratings, Moody's Corp., and S&P Global Ratings possess "undisclosed material conflicts of interest" due to their commitments to a UN-backed organization to integrate ESG into their financial analysis.

feed.title: Franklin Resources Releases Q2 2026 Financial Results
feed.summary: Franklin Resources, Inc. (BEN) reported strong Q2 2026 financial results, with adjusted earnings of $0.71 per share, significantly beating analysts' forecasts of $0.56 per share by 26.8%. The company also saw a 9.0% year-over-year revenue increase, reaching $2.29 billion, and managed $1,682.1 billion in Assets Under Management by quarter-end.

feed.title: Dean Buntrock, Co-Founder of Waste Management Who Turned Trash into a Multibillion-Dollar Empire, Dies at 94
feed.summary: Dean Buntrock, co-founder of Waste Management, has died at 94. He transformed a family trash business, Ace Scavenger Service, into a multibillion-dollar empire and the nation's largest waste handler. Buntrock initially planned to sell the business but recognized its potential and expanded it through acquisitions.

feed.title: Cummins Builds on Many Paths Strategy at ACT Expo
feed.summary: Cummins Inc. and Accelera by Cummins are showcasing a broad portfolio of power solutions at the 2026 Advanced Clean Transportation (ACT) Expo, emphasizing their "many paths" strategy for evolving customer and planetary needs. They are featuring advanced diesel, natural gas, hybrid, and battery electric technologies, including the 2027 X15 engine, X15N and L9N natural gas engines, and next-generation Accelera LFP batteries and 14Xe eAxle. Cummins is also demonstrating its digital capabilities for improved vehicle management and has a hybrid simulation truck that has been tested with Walmart.

feed.title: EVX Stock Price, News & Analysis
feed.summary: The VanEck Environmental Services ETF (EVX) is an exchange-traded fund listed on the NYSE Arca, sponsored by VanEck. This article details its fund structure, trading characteristics, association with VanEck's investment strategies, and various risk considerations for investors. It also covers recent stock performance, news, and frequently asked questions about EVX.

feed.title: Burford Capital (BUR) Is Down 5.6% After YPF Ruling Spurs Downgrade And Financing Concerns - Has The Bull Case Changed?
feed.summary: Burford Capital experienced a 5.6% stock drop following a U.S. Appeals Court decision in the YPF case, leading Wedbush to downgrade the company due to potential impacts on net worth requirements and debt financing. While Deutsche Bank remains positive, the ruling has shifted investor focus to Burford's balance sheet risks and access to capital for its case pipeline. This development challenges the company's prior investment narrative that litigation finance could stabilize cash flows and reduce YPF dependency.

feed.title: 12 Industrials Stocks Moving In Tuesday's Intraday Session
feed.summary: This article identifies 12 industrial stocks experiencing significant movement during Tuesday's intraday trading session. It highlights both gainers, such as Baiya International Group and Kforce following its Q1 earnings report, and losers, including High-Trend International and American Rebel Holdings which released Q4 earnings. The article provides the percentage change and current market capitalization for each mentioned company.

feed.title: 11 Consumer Discretionary Stocks Moving In Tuesday's Intraday Session
feed.summary: This article lists 11 consumer discretionary stocks that experienced significant movement during Tuesday's intraday session. These include gainers like Aterian, StableX Technologies, Sleep Number, Sports Entertainment, Nexera Techs, and Neo-Concept International, as well as decliners such as VisionSys AI, Purple Innovation, Fitness Champs Holdings, MMA, and Sportradar Group. The movements are attributed to various factors, including earnings reports for some companies.

feed.title: Biogen Q1 2026 earnings preview
feed.summary: This article provides a Q1 2026 earnings preview for Biogen. No specific details about the preview are available in the provided content.

feed.title: Silver Rock's Kumar Gears Up For Market Dislocation With $4 Billion War Chest
feed.summary: Silver Rock Capital Partners has raised $4 billion for its Tactical Allocation Strategy, marking its largest capital raise to date. This capital will be deployed into credit-focused deals across various market cycles, with a focus on corporate private lending and real asset lending, anticipating opportunities from market dislocations. The firm's managing partner, Vinay Kumar, emphasizes their readiness to capitalize on liquidity mismatches and evolving capital needs with their significant dry powder and disciplined investment approach.

feed.title: Ziff Davis (NASDAQ:ZD) Shares Gap Up - What's Next?
feed.summary: Ziff Davis (NASDAQ:ZD) shares gapped up before market open after previously closing at $46.54 and opening at $48.69. The company has a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts with an average target price of $41.13, following recent adjustments from firms like UBS Group, Citigroup, and Royal Bank of Canada. Institutional investors and hedge funds significantly increased their holdings in Ziff Davis during recent quarters.

feed.title: NRC Authorizes FPL's St. Lucie Nuclear Plant to Operate for Another 20 Years
feed.summary: The U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission (NRC) has approved subsequent license renewals for Florida Power & Light Company's (FPL) St. Lucie Nuclear Plant Units 1 and 2, extending their operations through 2056 and 2063, respectively. This decision ensures the continued supply of low-cost, clean nuclear energy to Florida and reinforces the plant's role as a significant economic engine for the region. The approval highlights NextEra Energy's commitment to American nuclear power, following similar renewals for other facilities.

feed.title: T-Mobile (TMUS) Stock: Merger Buzz, Fiber Deals, and Earnings — All at Once
feed.summary: T-Mobile is facing a busy period with its Q1 earnings report, ongoing merger speculation with Deutsche Telekom, and significant new fiber network expansion deals. Analysts expect adjusted EPS of $2.01 on $22.98 billion in revenue, while AT&T and Verizon have already set a high bar with their Q1 performances. The company's new joint ventures with Oak Hill Capital and Wren House aim to add over 1 million homes to its fiber network, aligning with its long-term broadband goals.

feed.title: T-Mobile (TMUS) Stock: Q1 Earnings Coincide With Merger Rumors and Major Fiber Expansion
feed.summary: T-Mobile's (TMUS) Q1 earnings report comes amid significant developments, including speculation of a full merger with Deutsche Telekom and an aggressive fiber network expansion through two new joint ventures. While competitor earnings have set a high bar, T-Mobile is focused on reaching 18-19 million broadband subscribers by 2030, with a substantial portion dedicated to fiber customers. These strategic moves and earnings results will be closely watched by investors given recent stock performance and competitive market dynamics.

feed.title: NRC extends Florida nuclear plant powering 1M homes into 2063
feed.summary: The U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission has authorized license renewals for Florida Power & Light Company's St. Lucie Nuclear Plant Units 1 and 2, extending their operations through 2056 and 2063, respectively. This decision ensures that the plant will continue to provide low-cost, clean nuclear energy to over 1 million homes, contributing significantly to Florida's power supply and local economy. The St. Lucie plant also provides approximately 400 permanent jobs and generates over $42 million in annual county taxes.

feed.title: Survey finds 94% plan new payment services; 36% have a strategy
feed.summary: Jack Henry's eighth annual Strategy Benchmark survey reveals that 94% of financial institutions plan to introduce new payment services within two years, but only 36% have a formal strategy for payments. The survey also highlights that 88% of institutions expect to increase technology budgets, with AI, digital banking, and data analytics being top investment priorities. Despite 18% planning to support stablecoins and cryptocurrency by 2027, only 3% have a formal strategy in place.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase (NYSE: JPM) offers $5.0M CPI‑linked notes maturing 2041
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. is offering $5 million in CPI-linked floating rate notes maturing on April 29, 2041. These notes will pay monthly interest based on the year-over-year change in the U.S. Consumer Price Index (CPI) plus a 2.425% spread, with a minimum interest rate of 0.00%. The offering price is $1,000 per note, and investors bear the credit risk of JPMorgan Chase & Co.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean Orders Two More Icon-Class Megaships From Meyer Turku
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group has ordered two additional Icon-class megaships from Finnish shipbuilder Meyer Turku, bringing the total to seven vessels in the class. These new ships are slated for delivery in 2029 and 2030, reinforcing Royal Caribbean's strategy of investing in larger, technologically advanced vessels and extending its shipbuilding pipeline for the next decade. The deal further solidifies Meyer Turku's position as a premier cruise ship builder and has significant economic implications for Finland.

feed.title: Microsoft Q3 Preview: Expert Says Story Isn't Broken, 'Expectations Got Ahead Of Reality'
feed.summary: Microsoft is set to report its third-quarter earnings, with analysts expecting record revenue of $81.4 billion and EPS of $4.07. Freedom Capital Markets Chief Market Strategist Jay Woods notes that while Microsoft's stock has faced pressure due to high expectations, the underlying story is not broken, with Azure growth and AI monetization being key watch points. The company's recent revision to its partnership with OpenAI and its impact on future fiscal years will also be a major focus for investors.

feed.title: Potent Cannabis Portfolio Expansions
feed.summary: Aurora Cannabis has significantly expanded its global medical cannabis product line across Canada, Europe, and Australia, introducing a variety of high-potency dried flowers, pre-rolls, and multi-cannabinoid pastilles. This expansion highlights a trend towards high-potency, diverse cannabinoid formulations, and standardized product launches in regulated international markets. The move signals shifts in medical cannabis manufacturing towards precision and specialization, with implications for pharmaceutical distribution, logistics, and advanced packaging and testing solutions.

feed.title: Ameren (AEE) Expected to Announce Quarterly Earnings on Tuesday
feed.summary: Ameren (AEE) is expected to announce its Q1 2026 earnings on Tuesday, May 5th, with analysts forecasting $1.17 EPS and $2.223 billion in revenue. The company recently increased its quarterly dividend to $0.75, resulting in an annualized yield of approximately 2.7%. Shares are trading around $112.41, and analysts have a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a target price of $117.31.

feed.title: Vanguard Capital Management (TT) files Schedule 13G reporting 7.49% stake
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has filed a Schedule 13G, reporting a 7.49% passive stake in Trane Technologies PLC (TT) as of March 31, 2026. This translates to beneficial ownership of 16,581,171 shares, with Vanguard exercising sole dispositive power over all these shares but sole voting power over only 2,198,423 shares. The filing indicates a passive investment intent and includes shares held by various Vanguard-affiliated funds and managed accounts.

feed.title: Xylem (NYSE: XYL) posts Q1 2026 profit growth and launches $1.5B buyback
feed.summary: Xylem Inc. reported strong first-quarter 2026 financial results, with net income attributable to Xylem rising to $193 million on revenues of $2,125 million, demonstrating increased profitability. The company also announced a new $1.5 billion share repurchase program, under which it has already repurchased 3.3 million shares for $399 million during the quarter. Xylem is raising its total revenue growth outlook for 2026 to 2% to 3% while maintaining its organic revenue growth outlook.

feed.title: Bank of America revamps Texas Instruments stock price target
feed.summary: Bank of America analysts have upgraded Texas Instruments (TXN) to a Buy rating and raised its price target to $320 from $235, following the company's best-ever quarterly performance. The upgrade reflects BofA's belief that Texas Instruments is entering a new era of free cash flow generation and is undergoing a "structural re-rating" due to strong Q1 results and an optimistic Q2 guide. Analysts increased earnings estimates for 2026, 2027, and 2028 significantly, attributing the positive outlook to strong industrial revenue growth, sticky aerospace and defense markets, and emerging AI-driven data center opportunities.

feed.title: Vanguard discloses 7.46% stake in TE Connectivity (NYSE: TEL)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has disclosed a significant stake in TE Connectivity PLC (NYSE: TEL), reporting beneficial ownership of 21,919,466 shares, which represents 7.46% of the common stock. This Schedule 13G filing indicates Vanguard has sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power over 2,872,425 shares. The filing underscores Vanguard's role as a major passive institutional investor in TE Connectivity.

feed.title: Raymond James cuts Spotify stock price target on investment spending By Investing.com
feed.summary: Raymond James has lowered its price target for Spotify Technology SA (NYSE:SPOT) to $555 from $605, while maintaining an Outperform rating. This adjustment follows Spotify's Q1 report and Q2 guidance that fell short of Street expectations, despite solid Q1 results. The firm attributes the target reduction to Spotify's strategic investments in product initiatives, including AI and marketing, which are expected to create "quarterly variability" but lead to "longer time frame" benefits.

feed.title: Aterian (ATER) Stock Rockets 122% Following $18M Asset Divestiture Deal
feed.summary: Aterian (ATER) shares surged over 122% after the company announced a binding agreement to sell its e-commerce brand assets to Trademark Global LLC for $18 million in cash. This divestiture, which includes six brands like Mueller Living and hOmeLabs, is valued at almost triple Aterian's market capitalization prior to the announcement. Concurrently, investor David Lazar will inject $7 million through convertible preferred shares and is set to become CEO, taking over from Arturo Rodriguez.

feed.title: Stifel reiterates Ecolab stock rating on mixed quarterly results
feed.summary: Stifel has reiterated a Buy rating and a $337.00 price target on Ecolab Inc. (NYSE:ECL) following the company's recent quarterly results. While Ecolab's revenue and EBIT margin performance exceeded expectations, and EPS met estimates, free cash flow came in below forecasts. The company has also raised its 2026 revenue guidance and plans to implement an energy surcharge, with expectations to stabilize gross margin faster than previous periods and improve volumes throughout the year.

feed.title: Warby Parker Makes Its Northwest Florida Debut at Grand Boulevard
feed.summary: Warby Parker has opened its first Northwest Florida location at Grand Boulevard in Miramar Beach. This new store offers a full range of eyewear, contacts, and eye exams, making designer-quality products accessible to local residents and visitors. The brand is also known for its "Buy a Pair, Give a Pair" program, through which it has distributed over 20 million pairs of glasses to people in need worldwide.

feed.title: Kiniksa posts Q1 beat thanks to Regeneron drug (KNSA:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Kiniksa Pharmaceuticals (KNSA) stock reached a 52-week high after reporting better-than-expected Q1 2026 earnings and raising its full-year outlook. The positive performance is attributed to strong sales of Arcalyst, its heart disease therapy, which is licensed from Regeneron (REGN).

feed.title: Republic Services planning major increase in organics processing
feed.summary: Republic Services is significantly expanding its organic waste processing capacity, aiming to add 355,000 tons annually in 2026, building on the 1.1 million tons processed in 2025. This growth is driven by increasing regulations and customer demand in states like California and Colorado. The company is opening new facilities and expanding existing ones, including a 60-acre composting site in San Bernardino, with a strategic focus on transfer stations to manage the growing volume of organic waste.

feed.title: BANC Maintained by DA Davidson -- Price Target Steady at $24.00
feed.summary: DA Davidson has maintained a Buy rating on Banc of California (BANC) with a steady price target of $24.00, reflecting confidence in the bank's performance despite the stock currently trading 6.0% above its GF Value™ of $17.93. The company holds a GF Score™ of 73/100, driven by strong momentum, but faces concerns due to insider activity showing significantly more shares sold than bought in the last three months. Investors are advised to be cautious given the overvalued status and mixed financial signals.

feed.title: Wave Life Sciences Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Provides Business Update
feed.summary: Wave Life Sciences has announced its first-quarter 2026 financial results and provided a business update. The company is advancing several RNA-based therapies, including WVE-007 for obesity, WVE-006 for AATD, and WVE-008 for PNPLA3 I148M liver disease, with multiple trials and regulatory milestones expected in 2026. Wave Life Sciences reported a net loss of $26.1 million for the quarter, with cash and cash equivalents of $544.6 million, providing a cash runway into Q3 2028.

feed.title: Lululemon Investors May Have to Wait Until 2027 For a Turnaround. Here's Why.
feed.summary: Lululemon's stock has heavily declined due to stalled sales growth, margin pressures, and increased competition, particularly in North America. The company's "Power of Three x2" revenue target for fiscal 2026 is expected to be missed. A turnaround is not anticipated until at least 2027, as the company works to stabilize its North American business, introduce new products, and expand internationally.

feed.title: Applovin Corp Stock (APP) Moved Down by 3.55% on Apr 28: What Signal Does It Send?
feed.summary: Applovin Corp (APP) stock declined by 3.55% on April 28th, largely due to broader market caution influenced by upcoming central bank decisions, major tech earnings, geopolitical tensions, and rising oil prices. Despite strong financial performance, the AI ad tech sector faces increased competition, regulatory scrutiny over data privacy, and potential shareholder dilution from an expanded equity plan. Insider selling and an active SEC investigation also contribute to the negative sentiment, although technical indicators present a mixed signal.
